hook: If dating starts to feel numbing, more swiping is usually not the cure.
body: Burnout makes you flatter, more impatient, and worse at noticing real fit when it finally appears.

hook: A lot of men respond to app fatigue by doubling volume instead of improving attention.
body: A short reset can sharpen your standards faster than forcing another hundred low-quality interactions.

hook: A short reset can sharpen your standards faster than forcing another hundred low-quality interactions.
body: A week off the apps can make it easier to see which profiles actually create curiosity rather than just passing stimulation.

hook: A week off the apps can make it easier to see which profiles actually create curiosity rather than just passing stimulation.
body: If you feel cynical or deadened, pause long enough to return with clearer standards and lower noise.
